title: Mild Vietnamese Tofu Pho
description: A light, savory soup with tofu, lemongrass, and fresh herbs, served in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Bring vegetable stock to a gentle simmer in a small saucepan.
Add lemongrass, ginger, star anise, cinnamon stick, and soy sauce to the broth and let infuse for 10 minutes.
While the broth simmers, drain tofu cubes and lightly pan‑fry them in a dry skillet until golden brown, then set aside.
Soak rice noodles in warm water for 5 minutes, then drain and reserve a cup of the soaking water.
Add tofu to the simmering broth and reduce heat to low.
Pour in the reserved noodle soaking water and stir in lime zest to create a light, clear emulsion.
Place the pre‑soaked noodles into the individual mini cocottes, then ladle the aromatic broth over them.
Top each serving with fresh basil, mint, bean sprouts, and a drizzle of the tofu‑infused broth.
Let the pho rest for 3 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
Garnish with additional lime wedges and enjoy immediately.
